calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-30-2017 Vacated

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-09-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lisa J. Espada, of The Law Offices of Lisa J. Espada, Tel. 415.504.6195, for defendants;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MELISSA MCMILLAN'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions is granted. Sanctions denied because they are not supported by declaration of counsel. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Tom Paoli; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2017 Set For Trial On Jul-03-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
